dashboard: Replay Debt Dashboard — Pandavs Recon Framework

metrics.name: ch_active_debt
metrics.label: ClickHouse Active Debt
metrics.description: PENDING + FAILED (retry-eligible) rows in sink_outbox for ClickHouse
metrics.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sink_outbox WHERE sink_target='clickhouse' AND status IN ('PENDING','FAILED') AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

metrics.name: neo4j_active_debt
metrics.label: Neo4j Active Debt
metrics.description: PENDING + FAILED (retry-eligible) rows in sink_outbox for Neo4j
metrics.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sink_outbox WHERE sink_target='neo4j' AND status IN ('PENDING','FAILED') AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

metrics.name: ch_dead_debt
metrics.label: ClickHouse Dead Debt (DLQ)
metrics.description: Rows in DLQ (status=DEAD) for ClickHouse — require manual intervention
metrics.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sink_outbox WHERE sink_target='clickhouse' AND status='DEAD'

metrics.name: neo4j_dead_debt
metrics.label: Neo4j Dead Debt (DLQ)
metrics.description: Rows in DLQ (status=DEAD) for Neo4j — require manual intervention
metrics.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sink_outbox WHERE sink_target='neo4j' AND status='DEAD'

metrics.name: ch_deferred_debt
metrics.label: ClickHouse Deferred Debt
metrics.description: FAILED rows in backoff window (next_retry_at in future) — temporarily ineligible
metrics.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sink_outbox WHERE sink_target='clickhouse' AND status='FAILED' AND next_retry_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

metrics.name: neo4j_deferred_debt
metrics.label: Neo4j Deferred Debt
metrics.description: FAILED rows in backoff window for Neo4j
metrics.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sink_outbox WHERE sink_target='neo4j' AND status='FAILED' AND next_retry_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

metrics.name: ch_sync_rate_h
metrics.label: ClickHouse Sync Rate (last hour)
metrics.description: Events successfully written to ClickHouse in the past hour
metrics.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_sync_ledger WHERE sink_target='clickhouse' AND synced_at >= datetime('now','-1 hour') AND outcome='SYNCED'

metrics.name: neo4j_sync_rate_h
metrics.label: Neo4j Sync Rate (last hour)
metrics.description: Events successfully written to Neo4j in the past hour
metrics.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_sync_ledger WHERE sink_target='neo4j' AND synced_at >= datetime('now','-1 hour') AND outcome='SYNCED'

metrics.name: ingest_rate_h
metrics.label: SQLite Ingest Rate (last hour)
metrics.description: New events written to events table from scanner in the past hour
metrics.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE ts >= datetime('now','-1 hour')

metrics.name: ch_halving_time_h
metrics.label: ClickHouse Debt Halving Time
metrics.description: Estimated hours to halve CH active debt at current net burn rate. Formula: active_debt / (sync_rate_h - ingest_rate_h). NULL if sync_rate <= ingest_rate (debt growing).

metrics.name: neo4j_halving_time_h
metrics.label: Neo4j Debt Halving Time
metrics.description: Estimated hours to halve Neo4j active debt at current net burn rate.

metrics.name: dlq_rate_24h_pct
metrics.label: DLQ Promotion Rate (last 24h)
metrics.description: Percentage of sync attempts that ended in DLQ promotion vs total SYNCED

component_queries.dead_promoted_24h: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dead_letter_events WHERE promoted_at >= datetime('now','-24 hour')
component_queries.synced_24h: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_sync_ledger WHERE synced_at >= datetime('now','-24 hour') AND outcome='SYNCED'

metrics.name: burn_rate_positive
metrics.label: Net Burn Rate Positive
metrics.description: Boolean: is sync_rate_h > ingest_rate_h for both sinks? (debt shrinking)

metrics.name: ch_claimed_count
metrics.label: ClickHouse In-Flight (CLAIMED)
metrics.description: Rows currently claimed by an active CH worker. Non-zero = worker is running.
metrics.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sink_outbox WHERE sink_target='clickhouse' AND status='CLAIMED'

metrics.name: neo4j_claimed_count
metrics.label: Neo4j In-Flight (CLAIMED)
metrics.description: Rows currently claimed by an active Neo4j worker. Non-zero = worker is running.
metrics.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sink_outbox WHERE sink_target='neo4j' AND status='CLAIMED'

go_no_go_gates.name: Neo4j DLQ clear
go_no_go_gates.blocks: Any new Neo4j node type introduction

go_no_go_gates.name: DLQ rate acceptable
go_no_go_gates.blocks: Any new event kind in sink_outbox

go_no_go_gates.name: Burn rate positive
go_no_go_gates.blocks: Any new scan module activation (increases ingest_rate)

throttle_tiers.name: Elevated debt — scanner running
throttle_tiers.note: Protects ingest_lag_s from RED zone per WO-00026 controller

throttle_tiers.name: DLQ intervention
throttle_tiers.note: Stop all replays, diagnose root cause, re-enqueue after fix

escalation_thresholds.action: Switch to Tier B throttle, alert operator
Switch to Tier C if possible, alert
Pause scanner, run Tier C drain
Stop all sink workers, diagnose DLQ
Evaluate: pause scanner or scale workers
